label: Fieldset
summary: Native fieldset and legend wearing the groove border.
era: The Windows group box: a groove border with its label riding the line, standard issue in every 90s options dialog.

classes.name: rs-fieldset
classes.role: native fieldset + legend with the groove border

a11y: The native <fieldset> and <legend> pair announces the group name with every control inside it, that grouping is the point, so never fake the legend with a heading.
